name: Autodock Vina
description: Predict how small molecules or drug candidates bind to a known binding site of a protein, specified through coordinates of a binding box. One of the fastest and most widely used open source docking softwares - receive your result in seconds. Predicts binding affinity (kcal/mol) and ligand pose.
capabilities: Predict how small molecules or drug candidates bind to a known binding site of a protein, specified through coordinates of a binding box
One of the fastest and most widely used open source docking softwares - receive your result in seconds
Predicts binding affinity (kcal/mol) and ligand pose

receptor.description: Receptor protein structure in PDB format

ligand_smiles.description: Alternative: ligand as SMILES string (used if no SDF file provided)

center_x.description: X coordinate of the binding box center

center_y.description: Y coordinate of the binding box center

center_z.description: Z coordinate of the binding box center

size_x.description: Width of the binding box along X axis (Angstroms)

size_y.description: Width of the binding box along Y axis (Angstroms)

size_z.description: Width of the binding box along Z axis (Angstroms)

exhaustiveness.description: Exhaustiveness of the global search (higher = more thorough but slower)

n_poses.description: Number of binding poses to generate
